body: Reconciled HORIZON against the bank; everything's collected except INV-105 (pharmacy maintenance, $13,061.60), which Meridian still hasn't paid. That's our only open item.

facts.note: HORIZON only open item; amount 13061.60 confirmed from invoice.

body: Regarding the $13,061.60 pharmacy maintenance invoice covering 2023-2026: no payment will be released until sponsor review closes. Please do not re-bill.

facts.note: Sponsor review pending; confirms no payment released.
No payment released until review closes.

body: ASCEND: two visit autopays show as issued but never deposited: S-33-003 V3 (~$523, ~4/20) and S-33-004 V1 (~$419, ~3/2). S-33-003 Screening came through at $627.55 but schedule is $685.40.

facts.note: Authorized autopay around 523.10 did not deposit.
Authorized autopay around 418.75 did not deposit.

body: ASCEND repeat-hematology draws are not in the autopay register yet; they bill per-procedure.

facts.note: Unscheduled repeat hematology is procedure-billed, not autopay.
